name: Flappy bacchan
description: Flappy Bacchan is a hilarious action-arcade game where you guide the legendary ‘Bacchan’ through crazy obstacles! Tap to fly, dodge pipes, beat high scores, and unlock epic stick-figure styles. With funny animations, catchy sound effects, and endless challenge, this game brings pure entertainment. Simple to play, hard to master — how far can you make Bacchan fly? Play, laugh, and compete with friends!
instructions: Desktop use mouse click Tap anywhere to jump Goal Fly through gaps avoid pipes and score points
